name: John Mwangi
text: Energen installed a 5kW system for my home. My electricity bill dropped by 70% and the installation was seamless. Highly recommend!

name: Grace Akinyi
text: We now have reliable power for our business thanks to Energen. The team was professional and the system works perfectly.

name: David Ochieng
text: I was skeptical about solar, but Energen walked me through the process. Now I’m saving over 10,000 KES monthly on electricity.

name: Sarah Wanjiru
text: They installed a solar water pump for our farm. It’s a game‑changer – no more diesel costs and water is always available.
